ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the mutation */,
  "chromosome_position" INTEGER /* Chromosome position of the mutation */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., missense_variant, non_coding_transcript_exon_variant) */,
  "mutation_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mutation (e.g., p.Asp94Gly) */,
  "mutation_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the mutation (e.g., gain-of-function, loss-of-function) */,
  "mutation_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in the population */,
  "mutation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the mutation on bacterial fitness (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "mutation_discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was first discovered */,
  "mutation_discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the researcher or team who discovered the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_mutation_type FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type") REFERENCES mutation_types ("mutation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_chromosome_position FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_position") REFERENCES chromosome_positions ("chromosome_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene in base pairs */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Primary function of the gene */,
  "gene_expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the gene (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "chromosome_description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  "chromosome_length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "chromosome_type" TEXT /* Type of chromosome (e.g., autosomal, sex chromosome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibiotics" (
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibiotic */,
  "antibiotic_name" TEXT /* Name of the antibiotic */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the antibiotic (e.g., fluoroquinolone) */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the antibiotic */,
  "antibiotic_discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the antibiotic was first discovered */,
  "antibiotic_discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the researcher or team who discovered the antibiotic */,
  "antibiotic_effectiveness_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the antibiotic's effectiveness (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "antibiotic_side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the antibiotic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibiotic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_antibiotic" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antibiotic */,
  "estimated_fraction" REAL /* Estimated fraction of the mutation in the population */,
  "resistance_mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism by which the mutation confers resistance (e.g., target modification, efflux pump overexpression) */,
  "resistance_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the resistance mechanism (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id", "antibiotic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antibiotic */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the reference */,
  "reference_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the reference (e.g., journal article, conference proceedings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_antibiotic_id FOREIGN KEY ("antibiotic_id") REFERENCES antibiotics ("antibiotic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_reference_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_type_id") REFERENCES literature_reference_types ("literature_reference_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antibiotic */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "trial_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "trial_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "trial_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the trial (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_antibiotic_id FOREIGN KEY ("antibiotic_id") REFERENCES antibiotics ("antibiotic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antibiotic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed during access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_antibiotic_id FOREIGN KEY ("antibiotic_id") REFERENCES antibiotics ("antibiotic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation type (e.g., missense_variant) */,
  "mutation_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_impact" TEXT /* General impact of the mutation type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosome_positions" (
  "chromosome_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome position */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimated_fractions" (
  "estimated_fraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimated fraction */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "estimated_fraction" REAL /* Estimated fraction of the mutation in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimated_fraction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibiotic_resistance" (
  "antibiotic_resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibiotic resistance entry */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antibiotic */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "resistance_level" TEXT /* Level of resistance (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibiotic_resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trial_phases" (
  "clinical_trial_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial phase */,
  "clinical_trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinical_trial_phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trial_phases_clinical_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_reference_types" (
  "literature_reference_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference type */,
  "literature_reference_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the literature reference type (e.g., journal article) */,
  "literature_reference_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the literature reference type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literature_reference_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
